# services.hydra

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.hydra`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.hydra.buildMachinesFiles` | `list of absolute path` | List of files containing build machines. |
| `services.hydra.dbi` | `string` | The DBI string for Hydra database connection. NOTE: Attempts to set `application_name` will be overridden by `hydra-TYPE` (where TYPE is e.g. `evaluator`, `queue-runner`, etc.) in all hydra services to more easily distinguish where queries are coming from. |
| `services.hydra.debugServer` | `boolean` | Whether to run the server in debug mode. |
| `services.hydra.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to run Hydra services. |
| `services.hydra.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra lines for the Hydra configuration. |
| `services.hydra.extraEnv` | `attribute set of string` | Extra environment variables for Hydra. |
| `services.hydra.gcRootsDir` | `absolute path` | Directory that holds Hydra garbage collector roots. |
| `services.hydra.hydraURL` | `string` | The base URL for the Hydra webserver instance. Used for links in emails. |
| `services.hydra.listenHost` | `string` | The hostname or address to listen on or `*` to listen on all interfaces. |
| `services.hydra.logo` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a file containing the logo of your Hydra instance. |
| `services.hydra.maxServers` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of starman workers to spawn. |
| `services.hydra.maxSpareServers` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of spare starman workers to keep. |
| `services.hydra.minSpareServers` | `signed integer` | Minimum number of spare starman workers to keep. |
| `services.hydra.minimumDiskFree` | `signed integer` | Threshold of minimum disk space (GiB) to determine if the queue runner should run or not. |
| `services.hydra.minimumDiskFreeEvaluator` | `signed integer` | Threshold of minimum disk space (GiB) to determine if the evaluator should run or not. |
| `services.hydra.notificationSender` | `string` | Sender email address used for email notifications. |
| `services.hydra.package` | `package` | The hydra package to use. |
| `services.hydra.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port the web server should listen to. |
| `services.hydra.smtpHost` | `null or string` | Hostname of the SMTP server to use to send email. |
| `services.hydra.tracker` | `string` | Piece of HTML that is included on all pages. |
| `services.hydra.useSubstitutes` | `boolean` | Whether to use binary caches for downloading store paths. Note that binary substitutions trigger (a potentially large number of) additional HTTP requests that slow down the queue monitor thread significantly. Also, this Hydra instance will serve those downloaded store paths to its users with its own signature attached as if it had built them itself, so don't enable this feature unless your active binary caches are absolute trustworthy. |
